title: Indulgent Winey Egyptian Flaky Pastry
description: A crispy, indulgent Egyptian dessert featuring a wine-soaked filling and a low-carb friendly lamination puff pastry crust, topped with mixed peel for added texture and flavor.

ingredients.name: White Wine
ingredients.notes: dry white wine (such as Sauvignon Blanc)

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out lamination puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer pastry to prepared baking sheet and cut into desired shape (e.g. rectangle, square, circle).
In a small bowl, whisk together white wine and granulated sugar until well combined. Stir in mixed peel.
Spread wine-soaked filling evenly over center of pastry, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around edges.
Brush edges of pastry with beaten egg yolks and fold up edges to form a crust.
Dot top of pastry with softened butter and brush with beaten egg yolks for a golden glaze.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until pastry is golden brown and filling is bubbly.
Allow pastry to cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
